feed.title: Daily weather forecast — Chrzanów,PL

entry.title: Chrzanów, PL: Wed 10 Jun — Light rain, 11–11°C
entry.content:
Light rain · High 11°C · Low 11°C

  • Chance of precipitation: 100%
  • Feels like (midday): 11°C
  • Wind: up to 4.3 m/s
